title: Whose archive does it go to?
excerpt: Say I (admin/owner) create a board  where dependent tasks automatically get assigned once the previous is checked completed.  When whoever is assigned to the very last task hits completed it is automated to archive the b…

posts.author: andrewlegend (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml: Say I (admin/owner) create a board where dependent tasks automatically get assigned once the previous is checked completed. When whoever is assigned to the very last task hits completed it is automated to archive the board. Does that go to that user who hit complete on the last items’ personal archive, or the board owners archive, or company archive? Not quite sure I understand archive hierarchy, if there is any.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: The archives are board specific. So whichever board it was archived from is where it will go. Anyone who had access to it before it was archived can access it in the archive/restore it etc
